overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a futuristic black sports car with pink neon trim driving through Night City on a rainy night. The vehicle navigates through neon-lit downtown streets, open plazas, underpasses, and highways before entering a corporate district.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with curved commercial building

events.description: vehicle makes a right turn at intersection entering plaza area

agents.ego_description: driving futuristic sports car through city streets, approaching intersection and turning right

notable_agents.action: green car driving ahead in same direction

entered.detail: tall curved building with horizontal green neon lighting strips and modern facade
elevated highway structure spanning across the road ahead with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic black sports car driving down a wet neon-lit street at night. A distinctive curved building with green neon trim dominates the left side while the car approaches an intersection, then turns right into a plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with wet reflective ground transitioning to covered underpass

events.description: enters open plaza area with wet reflective ground and commercial buildings
drives under overpass, lighting becomes darker and more artificial with neon signs visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet plaza and underpass, passing other vehicles and neon signs

notable_agents.action: black car passing on the left side in the plaza

entered.detail: commercial building with large yellow PANDELION signage and arched entrance
bright red neon sign for Dicky Twister establishment mounted on building
concrete overpass with large ventilation fans and industrial lighting

segments.scene_description: The car enters a spacious plaza with wet reflective pavement, passing the PANDELION building on the right. It then drives under a large overpass where the Dicky Twister neon sign becomes visible, transitioning from open sky to sheltered artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with red dedicated lanes approaching security gate

events.description: transitions from underpass to open highway with distinctive red lane markings
approaches and passes through the Skyline North checkpoint gate

agents.ego_description: accelerating on highway with red lanes, approaching the Skyline North security checkpoint

entered.detail: large red archway gate structure with Skyline North signage and lighting
tall cylindrical tower with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens
metal safety railing with orange reflective strips along elevated road edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the car enters an open highway with distinctive red lane markings. The Skyline North gate looms ahead as the vehicle approaches the checkpoint, passing tall billboard towers and highway railings along the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate downtown district with tight streets and heavy neon advertising

events.description: makes sharp right turn onto narrower street between tall buildings
navigates through series of tight turns and corners in dense urban environment

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight downtown streets, making sharp turns around corners between corporate towers

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving in opposite direction on narrow street

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and purple accent lighting
large digital billboard displaying animated character advertisements
futuristic police car with flashing blue lights parked on street side

segments.scene_description: Passing through the Skyline North gate, the car enters a dense corporate district with towering glass buildings covered in neon advertisements. The vehicle makes sharp turns through narrow wet streets, passing a parked police vehicle and navigating tight corners between the high-rise structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic sports car travels from the neon-lit downtown streets through an industrial transit corridor and into a dense corporate district. It begins by navigating a wet street beside a curved building with green neon trim before turning right into a spacious plaza with reflective pavement. As the car passes the Pandelion building, the scene shifts from the open sky to the sheltered artificial lighting of a large overpass beneath a Dicky Twister sign. The camera then follows the vehicle as it exits the underpass onto an open highway with red lane markings, approaching the Skyline North gate and its surrounding billboard towers. Finally, the environment transforms into a claustrophobic corporate hub of towering glass skyscrapers and neon advertisements, where the car makes sharp turns through narrow wet streets past a parked police vehicle.
